images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunning young Japanese gravure idol embodying a cool, sophisticated elegance, captured in an extreme close-up that focuses intensely on her expressive, alluring eyes. She is dressed in a form-fitting, sharp blazer and a textured pencil skirt that accentuates her slim waist and curvy silhouette, the fabric detailing rendering a tactile sense of realism. Seated by the window of a high-end, minimalist café, she holds a soft teddy bear with a distant, icy expression, creating a striking contrast between the innocent prop and her seductive gaze. The background is a creamy, desaturated bokeh of muted city tones, enhancing the cinematic atmosphere. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, the softbox beauty lighting illuminates her flawless skin texture and faint vellus hair, employing depth of field, ray tracing, and global illumination for an impeccable, viral Instagram-worthy shot.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
